items.question: Do I need to already be certified to dive in the Maldives?
items.answer: No — you can do a supervised Discover Scuba dive with no certification, or complete your Open Water certification while you're here.

items.question: Is equipment rental included?
items.answer: Usually rented separately from the dive package itself — we'll confirm exactly what's included before you book so there's no surprise at the dive center.

items.question: Liveaboard or resort/guesthouse-based diving — which is better?
items.answer: Liveaboards reach more remote sites and pack in more dives per day; resort or guesthouse-based diving is more relaxed and better if you want non-diving time too. We'll ask which matters more to you.

items.question: Are manta ray or whale shark sightings guaranteed?
items.answer: No sighting is ever guaranteed — it's wildlife. We time your trip to the season and site with the best odds, and always work with operators who follow responsible wildlife-viewing practices.
